content:
* We acknowledge that we are gathered on the traditional and unceded territory of the Algonquin Anishinaabe Nation. For generations, they have been the stewards of this land, and their deep connection to it continues to this day. We recognize the enduring presence and contributions of the Algonquin people to this region. We also acknowledge the painful history of colonization and the displacement of Indigenous communities from their ancestral lands. We commit ourselves to learning, understanding, and honoring the Algonquin Nation's history and culture. We recognize the importance of working collaboratively to create a more just and equitable future for all who call this land home.
________________
sentences: * We acknowledge that we are gathered on the traditional and unceded territory of the Algonquin Anishinaabe Nation.
For generations, they have been the stewards of this land, and their deep connection to it continues to this day.
We recognize the enduring presence and contributions of the Algonquin people to this region.
We also acknowledge the painful history of colonization and the displacement of Indigenous communities from their ancestral lands.
We commit ourselves to learning, understanding, and honoring the Algonquin Nation's history and culture.

We recognize the importance of working collaboratively to create a more just and equitable future for all who call this land home.
________________

content:
* Had a meeting with presidents, VP Social, VP Services and VP Equity to review follow up on english-only merch being made without consultation of ESS’s bilingual instances. The result was that VP Social and Services will have to make a franco only merch of their choice to fulfil the bilingual duties, assuming it passes BOD. Will consult with VP Social and Services for what motion to be put forward at BOD, depending on what franco only merch they want to make.
* Looking like I will report the watchparty for later stage of the competition as I was late on room booking and all rooms are booked wednesday for some reason.
* Will help organize a franco party event with UOSO for Mois de la Francophonie, if anyone wants to be involved, reach out :)
* Helping Steffen’s initiative to do a Franco Karaoke with profs at Nox.

* Looking like I will report the watchparty for later stage of the competition as I was late on room booking and all rooms are booked wednesday for some reason.
* Will help organize a franco party event with UOSO for Mois de la Francophonie, if anyone wants to be involved, reach out :)
* Helping Steffen’s initiative to do a Franco Karaoke with profs at Nox.

content:
* Ryn bringing this up on behalf of squid, the following points are just paraphrasing what we talked about
* No one is running for sustainability next year, sustainability is still important
* They think the position could have more potential but not currently enough mandated to be a proper exec role
* If its just consulting our practices maybe switch to commissioner, not that squid thinks thats the best option though
* Expanding the VP Sustainability mandate could include other aspects such as economic and social sustainability as well as environmental
* Squid is still passionate about the position but needs to exist differently than it is currently
* Not necessarily a common position among RSGs
* Are we planning to keep commissioner positions as strictly outlined next year as we are currently? Would there be the opportunity for sustainability to be more structured as a commissioner position in policy.
sentences:

*

*

*

If its just consulting our practices maybe switch to commissioner, not that squid thinks thats the best option though
* Expanding the VP Sustainability mandate could include other aspects such as economic and social sustainability as well as environmental
*

Squid is still passionate about the position but needs to exist differently than it is currently
*

Not necessarily a common position among RSGs
*
Are we planning to keep commissioner positions as strictly outlined next year as we are currently?
Would there be the opportunity for sustainability to be more structured as a commissioner position in policy.

content:
* Only faculty that does a fully catered dinner for W&C
* Incredibly expensive to feed 500 grads who each bring 4 people.
* Lowest price to feed all 2000 is $11/head
* $15 000 for Fall, even more for winter
* Dinner requires people to serve, makes a mess and is difficult to regulate
* Could shift focus towards wine and cheese (literally)
* Could shift focus to lighter fare, salad and sandwiches.
sentences:
* Only faculty that does a fully catered dinner for W&C
*
Incredibly expensive to feed 500 grads who each bring 4 people.

* Lowest price to feed all 2000 is $11/head
* $15 000 for Fall, even more for winter
*

Dinner requires people to serve, makes a mess and is difficult to regulate
* Could shift focus towards wine and cheese (literally)
* Could shift focus to lighter fare, salad and sandwiches.

content:
* New sales homepage that leads to all of our upcoming events (with tickets)
* Cyrus’s really cool new reimbursement form tutorial
* Replaces the F1 form
* Can submissions get an email confirmation?
* Note: Standing ovation was received
* Nick double note: There was a sitting ovation
* Commissioners Policy
* Do we want to remove commissioners from policy and make them more ad-hoc positions
* Keep them as appointment positions, but can put a post out if no one comes to mind for a position
* Could select teams in the summer, or select team structure
* Would be moving all commissioner mandates under their respective VP.
* Mandates make it easier to see what you are getting into; for 1st-2nd year students just joining ESS.
sentences: * New sales homepage that leads to all of our upcoming events (with tickets)

* Cyrus’s really cool new reimbursement form tutorial
*

Replaces the F1 form
*
Can submissions get an email confirmation?

* Note: Standing ovation was received
* Nick double note: There was a sitting ovation
* Commissioners Policy
*

Do we want to remove commissioners from policy and make them more ad-hoc positions
* Keep them as appointment positions, but can put a post out if no one comes to mind for a position
* Could select teams in the summer, or select team structure
* Would be moving all commissioner mandates under their respective VP.
Mandates make it easier to see what you are getting into; for 1st-2nd year students just joining ESS.
